rationale: Review 1 identifies the single real placement error (public `TauCeti.HopfAlgebra.antipode_convMul_id` lemma at line 64 inside AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints.lean, used only internally at 129; grounded exactly in the diff) and its private fix keeps structure/roadmap intent intact. Review 2's split demand is not required by placement (docs explicitly frame the file as Layer 0 milestone) and its extra non-placement claim is absent from the diff, so acting on it produces needless churn without improving the result.
